No. 1572/2014-Estt IV.—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (IVof Section 84 of the Andhra Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2014 (Act 6 of 2014), the Central Government hereby constitutes Apex Council consisting of— (a) Minister of Water Resources, Government of India —Chairperson; (b) Chief Minister of State of Andhra Pradesh —Member; (c) Chief Minister of State of Telangana —Member for the supervision of the functioning of the Godavari River Management Board and Krishna River Management Board with effect from 2nd June, 2014. URVILLA KHATI, Jt. Secy. 2228 GI/2014 Printed fay the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New De!hi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
